reviews.review_description: Why are you still selling this for oculus go just keeps saying no internet connection when there is, waste of time and money !

reviews.review_title: Great game to play with your kid
reviews.review_description: Great collaborative puzzle solving game.
The game is great and fun to play 60% of the time, but the rest of the time is me trying to walk forward with lots of difficulty and having to walk backwards to get around.
I like that they utilise a phone for the second player. Theres very few go games that do that. Me and the wife had fun once she got the hang of it. Good pass back and forth game

This is a great game, I love the co-op aspect of it but White Elk developers if you’re listening to your customers please, please add gamepad support to your titles, the Oculus Go controller is terrible and is spoiling what is otherwise a fantastic game. I don’t just mean the Go controller is not a great input device, it’s fundamentally broken in Covert as you have to tap the top of the trackpad to move forward and the go controller has major issues with detecting this and allowing you to move yourself in the intended direction, this is seriously frustrating when you need to run past guards or to navigate the electric floors it breaks the immersion in a big way. I know that not everyone has a gamepad but for those who do, being able to use it is infuriating.
Sometimes the controls stop working but that doesn’t take any of the fun out of the game. If you are looking for a two player game this is what you are looking for.￼

This game is really fun! I wish I could play it more. Unfortunately it makes me nauseous and I can’t play for long. I wish it had a way to narrow the field of vision like they do in “Slightly Heroes”. That helps a lot for people like me who get motion sickness really easily.
A little glitchy at times. We love this game! Great for gaming as a couple. Immersive and nice graphics/ maps. Haven’t totally finished the game yet after 5+ hours of gameplay. Would love expansions.

Hello.
I bought the game but I can't install the app because it says that my phone is not compatible. My phone it has Android 7.1What's the problem? Can you help me? I wanted so bad this game....

developer_response.body:
Edit: We have updated the app to allow for more Android devices.  Please let us know if it works.  

Hi,

Could you please email us at hello@WhiteElkStudios.com so we can look into this issue?  We really want you to play the game too!  :)

Thanks!

reviews.review_description: Hacker no longer disconnects on mission 4, can now complete a great game!

developer_response.body: Glad to hear that it's working! :)

reviews.review_description:
I played this game with one of my housemates as soon as I got it. While I enjoyed the narrative and concept of the game, the controls left me continually frustrated. It often took me several times to try and turn. This broke the fluidity I've come to expect from a first-person adventure game. There was also a puzzle early on (breaking the window) that wasn't explained very well. It took me several minutes of continually pressing buttons to figure out what I was supposed to do. 

If you can put these minor issues aside, definitely buy it. It's a beautiful game and is a lot of fun, but I'd like to see support for a game pad so I can more fluidly move and turn.
A

I believe that anyone can pick up this game and play it. If you are having trouble with movement, then centering your controller can help.
Keep in mind that in the later stages, the game can get kind of unstable (especially in stage 5).

On my second Oculus go controller and I cannot move forward consistently.   I also see multiple reviews with the same issue, and I have found this issue identified in an oculus development forum from several months ago.   This issue makes this game almost useless.   Maybe the developer could allow for a game pad controller?  Very disappointed with this issue.  I have seen this issue with other games as well.

Great idea and it works really well! A small audio delay and goofy synchronized button push task are a little bit irritating. Would be cool to manually adjust delay between the devices for better accuracy)
YES

I am super impressed with this game, the imersion, the team play, the challenges.  Right up until the controller fails to register my input and ruins the game.

I sincerely hope the developer will find a way to improve the imput or provide an option for a left hand controler for movement.
Good good but extra playing you motion sick

This is one of my favorite games on VR.. multiplayer with a friend.. puzzles.. just all around alot of fun... But.. the companion app closes at mission 4.. I've restarted the internet, app, and phone.. I even redid all the missions up to it.. but still crashes at mission 4.. please fix

developer_response.body: Hi, Could you please email us at hello@WhiteElkStudios.com so we can look into your issue?  Thanks!

reviews.review_description: Get to connected loading game and doesn't go any further. Haven't been able to try first heist. Very disappointed.

developer_response.body: Hi, We recently have updated the app.  I hope this fixes your issue.  If not, please email us at hello@WhiteElkStudios.com.  Thanks!
